hero.name: Tanveer Ahmad
hero.title: Experienced developer specializing in AI automation and RAG applications
hero.bio: I help businesses automate their workflows and build AI knowledge bases using RAG technology, n8n, and modern cloud infrastructure. My tools let your team ask questions and get instant answers from your own documents, manuals, and data. I leverage AI-assisted development to deliver solutions faster and more affordably than traditional development without compromising on quality.
hero.aboutMe: I am a software developer based in Lahore, Pakistan with over 20 years of experience delivering real working software to clients in Pakistan, USA, and Australia. My career spans desktop applications for Pakistan's textile industry, large-scale automation systems for US clients, affiliate marketing platforms, social media automation, and now AI-powered web applications. I have built payroll systems running for 1,000+ employees, automation bots operating for 15 consecutive years, and AI education platforms with RAG, vector search, and live video. I started in 2005 building database applications for Faisalabad's textile industry. Over the years I worked with clients in the USA and Australia, delivered projects across completely different industries and technologies, and adapted to every major shift in the software industry from desktop to web, from manual to automated, from traditional development to AI-assisted building. Today I specialize in AI integration, RAG applications, n8n automation workflows, and full stack Next.js development. I use AI-assisted development to deliver faster and more affordably the same way every modern developer works in 2026. I do not just write code. I solve problems that matter to real businesses.

Deployed full self-hosted Supabase, Qdrant and MongoDB stack on AWS
Developed PDF chat application showcasing RAG technology for client acquisition

projects.name: LearnByAI.app — AI-Powered Education Platform - 2026
projects.description: An AI-powered education platform where students upload books and interact with AI tutors using RAG technology. Features multilingual responses with audio playback, AI-generated quizzes and study plans, teacher dashboard with live video classes, and full institution management for schools and coaching centers. Built with Next.js, Python, AWS, Qdrant vector search, MongoDB, Supabase, and OpenAI.

projects.name: Docly — PDF Chat Application with RAG- 2025
projects.description: A document intelligence tool that lets users upload any PDF and have an AI-powered conversation with it. Supports multilingual answers, audio responses, file uploads, and voice messages. Built with Python FastAPI backend, Qdrant vector database, and Next.js frontend deployed on AWS and Vercel.

projects.name: ieImpact AI Chatbot - Hemant Jindal, USA - 2025
projects.description: A professional website with an integrated multimodal AI chatbot powered by n8n automation backend. Supports real-time text conversations, file uploads, and audio messages. Built for Mr. Hemant Jindal, USA property investment consultant. Demonstrates advanced n8n agent workflow integration with a production Next.js frontend.

projects.name: Point of Sale System - Local Retail Business, Faisalabad - 2018
projects.description: A complete retail management system built for a local business and still running successfully after years in production. Features include billing, inventory management, stock control, customer database, credit management, and professional reports. Built with .NET and SQL Server with Crystal Reports for business reporting. -  Live in production

projects.name: LinkedIn Automation Platform, NetworkAfterWork, USA 2007-2017
projects.description: Duration: 10 years- A large-scale LinkedIn outreach automation system built and maintained for NetworkAfterWork, USA — one of the largest professional networking event companies in America. Managed automated connection requests, targeted messaging campaigns, and thousands of accounts simultaneously. Operated and maintained this system for over 15 years with a team of operators. Demonstrated deep expertise in automation, bot development, and large-scale campaign management.

projects.name: MySpace Affiliate Marketing Automation, Ronald Curtis USA - 2006
projects.description: Duration: 4 years - A joint venture automation project with Mr. Ronald Curtis, USA during MySpace's peak popularity. Built custom bots for automated lead generation and affiliate marketing campaigns. Generated consistent leads at scale using MySpace's social platform, demonstrating early expertise in social media automation and US market affiliate marketing at a time when these techniques were cutting edge.

projects.name: Scrapbook Graphics Application - COMSDEV Software, Faisalabad - 2006
projects.description: A desktop graphics application built for a US client while working as a Software Engineer at COMSDEV Software Company, Faisalabad. Allowed users to create, customize, and manage digital scrapbook designs with graphics editing capabilities. Delivered as a commercial product for the US market.

projects.name: Cloth Production & Grading System - Rana Textile Mills, Faisalabad - 2004
projects.description: A production management system for one of Faisalabad's major textile mills covering cloth production tracking and quality grading workflows. Successfully implemented and adopted across the mill's operations. Achievement: Received a full salary cash reward from the mill owner upon successful implementation, a rare recognition of exceptional delivery.

projects.name: 2nd Choice Production Reports System - Rana Denim, Faisalabad - 2005
projects.description: A specialized reporting system for tracking and managing second-choice fabric production at Rana Denim. Provided management with accurate production analytics and reports to minimize waste and optimize quality control. Achievement: Received a full salary cash reward from the owner upon successful implementation. Achievement: Full salary cash reward from mill owner.

projects.name: Card Swipe Attendance & Payroll System - Rana Textile Mills, Faisalabad - 2004
projects.description: A complete HR automation system managing attendance and payroll for over 1,000 employees using card swipe technology. Ran successfully for more than 5 years in continuous production. Handled shift management, overtime calculations, deductions, and full payroll processing for a large industrial workforce.
